name: superpowers-rails
description: Rails-focused fork of Superpowers: an agentic skills framework & software development methodology with planning, TDD, debugging, collaboration workflows, and Rails conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents, with Rails conventions
interface.longDescription: Use Superpowers Rails to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, finish-the-branch workflows, and Rails convention enforcement. A Rails-focused fork of Jesse Vincent's Superpowers.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
